action_set_definitions.name: get_system_status
action_set_definitions.description: Check the current operational status of the pharmacy verification system and database.

action_set_definitions.name: list_pending_orders
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieve the full list of medication orders currently awaiting verification in the queue.

action_set_definitions.name: get_patient_clinical_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieve the comprehensive health record for a specific patient, including active medications, allergies, and lab results like INR.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier of the patient (e.g., PAT-777).

action_set_definitions.name: check_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Query the pharmacy inventory to check the available stock quantity for a specific drug.

drug_name.description: The name of the medication to check.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_prescription_action
action_set_definitions.description: Execute the final decision (Approve, Reject, or Flag) for a specific prescription ID.

prescription_id.description: The unique ID of the prescription being processed.

notes.description: Reasoning for the decision, mandatory for rejections or flags.

state_description.pending_prescriptions: A list of prescription objects currently awaiting verification, including patient_id, drug_name, dosage, and prescriber info.
state_description.inventory: A mapping of drug names to their current stock quantities in the pharmacy.
state_description.patient_health_records: Historical data for patients, including allergies and currently active medications for interaction checking.
state_description.verification_log: A history of actions taken on prescriptions (approved, rejected, flagged) during the current session.
state_description.system_status: Current operational status of the verification database (e.g., 'online', 'maintenance').
